name: antigravity

edits.disables: VS Code-layer telemetry (Application Insights). Does NOT confirm-stop Google's Interactions/training pipeline.
Crash dumps to Google (VS Code deprecated key, still honored in the fork)

process_check.if_running: Quit Antigravity (including helper processes) before editing settings.json — Electron rewrites on shutdown and will clobber manual edits.

notes: Google-branded VS Code fork (v1.107.0). No env var or CLI flag documented — see caveat for the training-pipeline opt-out.

caveats.framing: AI training opt-out is EMAIL-ONLY — no settings key or env var. Send a request to antigravity-support@google.com to delete your Interactions data. Google otherwise uses Interactions for ML training unless accessed via Workspace/GCP.
